# done: af done tears down tmux + git (both satisfied by the global
# passthrough fakes) and moves the session dir into
# $HOME/.local/share/af/v1/archive/.
#
# Fixtures have no [pr] section and no slicer VM, so no PR refresh or
# ADR-067 auto-sync fires — everything stays hermetic.
#
# Scenarios:
#   1. Failure: unknown session name — state.toml cannot be read.
#   2. af done demo   — completes and archives the workstream.
#   3. af done demo2 --force — abandons and archives the workstream.
#   4. Failure: af done on the already-archived session.

env HOME=$WORK/home

# ── Failure 1: unknown session name ───────────────────────────────────────────
! exec af done ghost
stderr 'session directory'
stderr 'ghost'

# ── Scenario 2: complete demo ─────────────────────────────────────────────────
exec af done demo
stdout 'workstream demo -> completed'
stdout '→ archived; see: af retro   \(list archives: af clean --dry-run\)'

exists $HOME/.local/share/af/v1/archive/demo/state.toml
! exists $HOME/.local/share/af/v1/sessions/demo/state.toml
grep 'status = "completed"' $HOME/.local/share/af/v1/archive/demo/state.toml
grep '"event":"completed"' $HOME/.local/share/af/v1/archive/demo/ledger.jsonl
# ADR-068 §4 (issue #16): the lock done itself materialised must not
# survive into the archive.
! exists $HOME/.local/share/af/v1/archive/demo/.af.lock

# ── Scenario 3: force-abandon demo2 ───────────────────────────────────────────
exec af done demo2 --force
stdout 'workstream demo2 -> abandoned'

exists $HOME/.local/share/af/v1/archive/demo2/state.toml
! exists $HOME/.local/share/af/v1/sessions/demo2/state.toml
grep 'status = "abandoned"' $HOME/.local/share/af/v1/archive/demo2/state.toml
grep '"event":"abandoned"' $HOME/.local/share/af/v1/archive/demo2/ledger.jsonl
! exists $HOME/.local/share/af/v1/archive/demo2/.af.lock

# ── Failure 4: done again on the archived session ─────────────────────────────
# The state dir moved to the archive, so a second done finds no session dir.
! exec af done demo
stderr 'session directory'

# ── Initial file content ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────

-- home/.local/share/af/v1/sessions/demo/state.toml --
schema_version = 1

[session]
id = "00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001"
name = "demo"
status = "active"
created_at = 2026-05-22T10:00:00Z

[worktree]
path = "/tmp/worktree-demo"
branch = "feat/demo"
base_branch = "main"

[execution]
tmux_session = "af-demo"

-- home/.local/share/af/v1/sessions/demo2/state.toml --
schema_version = 1

[session]
id = "00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000002"
name = "demo2"
status = "suspended"
created_at = 2026-05-22T11:00:00Z

[worktree]
path = "/tmp/worktree-demo2"
branch = "feat/demo2"
base_branch = "main"

[execution]
tmux_session = "af-demo2"
